reviews.review_description:
Didn't really know what to make of this, it is rather bizarre but then i suppose that is the whole point. I do like bizarre so I'd be lying if I said I didn't like this. The one with the skulls was the best and picture quality was great. Hope that you add more worlds.

Update 30/12/20
Changed my phone to a samsung galaxy S10 from an S7 and cannot get this app to install on it. It downloads and then attempts to install but I get a message saying it didn't install. Is there a way around this please as I purchased this app and would like to continue using it.
Very good although I thought I could move freely
The game play and visuals are very good (could be a little more realistic). Each world needs more places to explore and there needs to be more than 3 worlds.
If i can rate this a - i would . This should be free
Cool and interesting places to visit.
Basically a 3D art installation, very cool and immersive.
Beautiful and stunning. Instantly transport to somewhere outside of earth.

developer_response.body: So glad you loved Other Worlds DeeDee! Thank you so much for the review. :)

reviews.review_description: If i have known that this app was by the devs of Face your Fears, i would have gotten it much sooner.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Homer! <3 Thank you for the support!

reviews.review_description: Boo!
Game works fine but its a bit dull. Needs objects to fly past you etc
really like all the vr apps from the turtle rock, the graphics is so amzing . i love this so much and also face the fear, can't wait to see more

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the love and support gallon! You can expect a lot more from us! :)

reviews.review_description: I wanted to love this but it didn’t work for me. If it was a game maybe it would be cool.
Lovely to look at, but an awkward chore to navigate. I have a gamepad, please give me the option to use it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback Aquareon. If you tap the side button on the Gear VR headset while looking at the gems -- you can start the move faster. :) We are currently looking into what it would take to add controller support.

reviews.review_description: In my opinion it should have free roam or atleast partial free roam it's also really Short and slow unless you have fast movement on but really well detailed could do with controller support!

Similar to GrooVR but creepier. There are 3 worlds. Awesome for 10 minutes, plus replay value. Good for demoing to family/friends.
(btw, the screenshots aren't very helpful. I was sold from watching a YouTube let's play)

I was reading some of the comments other users left... I dont think most users understand what this app is about?

Its very well done!

developer_response.body:
Wait -- did it get you? They aren't supposed to do that. :O

Thank you for your review. :)

reviews.review_description: I had this uninstalled for a while just because  I had many other apps in my library..however this is one of my favorites..excellent experience I would definitely recommend adding this to your collection...It's very different and I find it very calming...the environment that includes the skull formations is awesome
Although it is a little bit creepy, the graphics are nice.
Please add more worlds and motion controller support. oh by the way i think it will be a good idea if users can upload audio inside the app instead of constantly removing the headset to do that.

reviews.review_title: Great for a new VR customer.
reviews.review_description: This should always be the first app to use when it comes to being new to this VR world. Although there's not a variety of choices, only 3 worlds (a sort of heaven, someplace like hell and a rare world), it's beautiful.
